title: Continue implementing simulation harness features
description: Implement the remaining simulation harness features including visualization of DODAG formation and support for reproducible runs (seeded RNG).
close_reason: Both named sim-harness features delivered: seeded RNG for reproducible runs (j34, Simulation.rng/seed/reseed + LossRule) and DODAG-formation visualization (hrv, rpl/visualize.py DOT+ASCII). No further harness work specified.
